misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Lakeside Golf Vammala. A competitor known for his meticulous approach to the game, Mikko brings a wealth of experience to the greens.

With eleven past appearances, Mikko is still actively participating in Hector events and is admired for his strategic play and unwavering focus. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Mikko's dedication to the sport remains undiminished.

Off the course, Mikko is known to have planted his seeds in four different women across four different decades, showcasing a zest for life that mirrors his approach to golf. Whether on the course or off, Mikko approaches everything with passion.
